error_signature: OAuth Redirect URL still refers to localhost
title: OAuth Redirect URL not updating from localhost
symptom: The OAuth Redirect URL remains set to localhost even after changing environment variables and restarting the Docker container.
not_this_if: Environment variables are correctly set and the URL updates
root_cause: The OAuth Redirect URL is determined by the environment variables N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL and WEBHOOK_URL. If these are not set correctly to the public URL, n8n defaults to localhost, causing connection issues during OAuth authentication.
fix_steps: Set the environment variables N8N_HOST, N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL, and WEBHOOK_URL to your public URL.
Restart the Docker container to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Ensure the environment variables are set to your public URL and restart the Docker container.
